name: reply_rate
definition: Replies received divided by first-touch messages sent, over a 14-day window per cohort.
target_hint: B2B cold email to ICP: 5–15% healthy; LinkedIn DM: 8–20%. Below 3% = hook or list problem.

name: positive_reply_rate
definition: Replies expressing interest or asking for next step divided by total replies.
target_hint: ≥50% of replies should be positive or curious. Mostly 'not interested' = wrong ICP or weak value line.

name: meeting_booked_rate
definition: Meetings booked divided by first-touch messages sent.
target_hint: 1–4% for cold outbound to qualified list. Track by channel separately.

name: personalization_evidence_rate
definition: Drafts with cited public evidence in line 1 divided by total drafts.
target_hint: 100% before user sends. Zero tolerance for template-only hooks.

name: follow_up_lift
definition: Incremental replies attributed to follow-up 1 or 2 divided by non-responders after touch 1.
target_hint: Follow-up 1 should add 30–50% of total replies. If <10%, follow-ups are too weak.
